testing.reason: Component migration changes rendered output and event handling (filter buttons, search inputs, mark-done). Existing app-specific tests must still pass after swapping to shared components.

verification.reason: This is a pure component migration with no new features or changed behavior. Build verification (pnpm build) and existing tests cover correctness. Visual regression is out of scope for this issue.
